query:
-- Pegar sequencial e zonas
SELECT czr.numeroZona, czr.nomeMunicipio, czr.codigoMunicipio, czr.totalVotos, czr.ano, czr.turno,
       ez.bairro, ez.municipio as ez_municipio, ez.uf as ez_uf
FROM candidate_zone_results czr
LEFT JOIN electoral_zones ez ON ez.uf = czr.uf AND CAST(ez.numeroZona AS CHAR) = CAST(czr.numeroZona AS CHAR)
WHERE czr.candidatoSequencial = (
  SELECT candidatoSequencial FROM candidate_results 
  WHERE candidatoNomeUrna LIKE '%BARBARA%MATOS%' AND uf = 'PA' LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY czr.numeroZona
LIMIT 30;
